title: pelargonium × acutidentatum
intro: Pelargonium × acutidentatum, also known as the acute-toothed geranium, is a species of flowering plant in the Geraniaceae family. This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which can be attributed to the presence of compounds like geraniol and linalool. The health benefits of Pelargonium × acutidentatum include relief from digestive issues, anxiety, and insomnia, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate cold and flu symptoms. Herbal preparations of this plant can be found in the form of teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
